# AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes

**Object**

The attributes you set that describe the new Advanced App Clip Experiences resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes
```

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place**: The place information of an advanced App Clip experience you create with this request.

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships**: The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.
